Your Trusted Mobile Notary Partner in Gastonia

Need a mobile notary in Gastonia, NC? Integrity Closings CLT provides professional, on-demand notary services throughout Gaston County. Whether you're at a local coffee shop in the Historic District, a business near Franklin Square, or your own front door, we bring the notary office to you. We are committed to providing Gastonia residents with secure, accurate, and stress-free notarizations for all their legal and financial documents.

Our Service Guarantee

We guarantee professional, accurate, and punctual service. If we make a clerical error on your notarization, we will return to correct it at no additional cost to you.

Specialized Notary Services

We handle complex legal documents with precision and care, ensuring every signing is legally binding and stress-free.

Loan Signing Services

Expert handling of mortgages, refinances, HELOCs, and seller packages. We serve homeowners in neighborhoods like Loray Mill, Boogertown, and Ranlo.
Learn More

Estate Planning Notary

Secure notarization for Power of Attorney (POA), Wills, and Trusts. We are happy to meet at local landmarks such as Schiele Museum or the Gaston County Public Library.
Learn More

Hospital & Nursing Home

Compassionate bedside notary services for medical POAs and living wills for patients at CaroMont Regional Medical Center and surrounding care facilities.
Learn More

After Hours Notary

Available for late-night and weekend signings near Crowders Mountain and across the Gastonia area when standard offices are closed.
Learn More

General Notary Services

Mobile notarization for affidavits, I-9 verifications, and vehicle titles. We meet you anywhere in Gastonia for your convenience.
Learn More

Business & Corporate

Professional notary support for corporate contracts and employment documents. Serving businesses in the FUSE District and beyond.
Learn More

Hospital & Nursing Home Notary

Legal matters don't stop for medical emergencies. We provide compassionate, mobile notary services to patients and families at the primary healthcare hubs in the Gastonia area:

1

CaroMont Regional Medical Center

Gastonia, NC

We provide bedside notary services for medical POAs, living wills, and other urgent documents for patients at CaroMont near Court Drive.
2

Peak Resources Gastonia

Gastonia, NC

Conveniently serving rehabilitation and nursing facilities. We offer flexible scheduling to meet you or your loved ones to handle important legal paperwork.

Frequently Asked Questions

Common questions about our mobile notary services in Gastonia, NC.

How quickly can a mobile notary get to Gastonia?
We can often have a notary at your location in Gastonia within 60-90 minutes, depending on current availability and traffic.
Do you offer notary services near Franklin Square?
Yes! We frequently serve the Franklin Square area, meeting clients at offices, restaurants, or their homes in the surrounding neighborhoods.
Can you notarize documents at CaroMont Regional Medical Center?
Absolutely. We frequently provide bedside notary services at CaroMont for medical directives, powers of attorney, and other urgent legal documents.
What are your hours for mobile notary in Gastonia?
We offer 24/7 mobile notary services by appointment. This includes evenings, weekends, and holidays to accommodate your busy schedule.

Need a Notary in Gastonia Right Now?

We offer same-day appointments and after-hours emergency services to ensure your documents are signed when you need them.
